name: ccclaw-lite
description: Electron desktop setup wizard for OpenClaw.
author: 秋芝2046

scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && CCCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac dir --publish never
scripts.package:mac: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish --skip-notarize && npm run build:app && CCCLAW_SKIP_NOTARIZE=1 node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --publish never
scripts.package:mac:notarized: npm run check:mac:release-env -- --allow-placeholder-publish && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --publish never
scripts.release:mac: npm run check:mac:release-env && npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac --publish never
scripts.package:win: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win --publish never
scripts.package:win:dir: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win dir --publish never
scripts.package:win:x64: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:win:ia32: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win --ia32 --publish never
scripts.release:win: npm run build:app && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win --publish always
